title: Psychotria belamboi
intro: Psychotria belamboi is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Madagascar yellow psychotria. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and inflammation, due to its reported health benefits of reducing oxidative stress and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Psychotria belamboi include phenolic compounds, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Psychotria belamboi include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate respiratory issues.
